subcodes.first_line: O trusted one of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! In human reality hath the All-Glorious deposited His most great sign, a trust unto certain faithful ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای موتمن عبدالبهاء حضرت کبریا در حقیقت انسان ایت کبری ودیعه نهاد بعضی موتمن
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @human reality created in the image of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
